messages.content: hello. is the Samsung Gear S3 Classic still available?
hi, are you interested in the Samsung Gear S3 Classic?
the lowest i could go is 275.0.
how about 255.0 with free shipping and the warranty
hi i am interested in this Panasonic 32" TV. does it look good?
that phone treated me great how about 100.0
thanks for being flexible, 91.0 it is
all accessories, including propeller replacements are included
i will pay 100.0 with the warranty, free shipping and insurance on the item.
hello, your how is nice but are any utilities included?
i can do 2160.0 but you will have to pay the garbage?
i'm interested in the $1295 Studio Apt in Richmond -walk-in distance to Bart you advertised.
have a beautiful Used high end printer Dell 2130cn
it actualy is a very high end Used high end printer Dell 2130cn how about 300.0
you couldn't let it go for 231.0?
yes it is. im asking 1633.0 for it.
how about we make a deal for 816.0,
are you still interested? i can do 1580.0
can you lock it in at 1170.0?
1310.0 and paint the door red too. final offer.
hello, i am interested in your heritage park listing.
hi, are you interested in this Ideal location in Livermore! Will not last!?
the listing price is 1900.0, though that could be negotiated.
i am sorry, but the rent is 1900.0... 1440.0 is much too low.
the lowest i can do is 1750.0
hi. i'm interested in your Swann 4 Camera Home Security System for sale. what'd you pay?
i can give it for 165.0 last
this Swann 4 Camera Home Security System is brand new and super nice quality. i would be willing to sell it for 150.0
highest i'm willling to go is 121.0.
i'll do 144.0 for the subs or 275 for both
since i am picking it up i would like to stay at the 121.0.
132.0 is the lowest i'm willing to go. but i'll bring it to you. anytime tomorrow.
ok, i think we can agree on 132.0.
yes i do! i'm listing it for 125.0, gently used. bought it for 125.0
122.0 was my offer, take it or leave it
if you can pay 116.0, i will throw all of that in. deal?
ok fine then we are in agreement 116.0
yes, hello, are these two pieces of furniture in good condition?
would you be willing to take 300.0 for it?
that's a bit low for the worth of the Rosewood Dining Table, 8 chairs, Corner Cabinet. i could do 600.0.
how about 518.0 and i will deliver it to you myself?
hi, i am vey interested in the Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug (Pinks) you have for sale
how about 500.0 and i deliver it?
i can do 398.0 cash and you deliver it?
455.0 final offer. its a very good piece of furniture
i could meet you half way on the price at 443.0 but no delivery.
there are very pretty so sure, 418.0 works.
